description_long: This is a two-tiered rectangular shelf unit with a minimalist, industrial design. The structure consists of two flat wooden shelves supported by a black metal frame on both sides, providing stability and a modern aesthetic. The top and bottom shelves are spacious and open, allowing for the storage or display of various items. The frame is composed of straight, angular metal bars that connect the shelves at the corners, leaving the front and back open for easy access. The wood has a medium brown finish with a subtle grain pattern, while the metal frame is matte black. There are no doors, drawers, or visible handles, emphasizing its open and functional design.
description: A modern, two-tiered open shelf with brown wooden surfaces and a black metal frame. The design is minimalist and functional, suitable for storage or display.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thickness of the wooden shelves and the vertical black metal frame.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open back and the parallel alignment of the two shelves with the supporting frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the shelf thickness and frame.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the open access to both shelves and the full width of the unit.
